title: patch.unit.completed.v1 payload
description: Payload of the patch.unit.completed.v1 event (TenantContext envelope, ADR-0013 appendix example 1). Thin notification projection of the domain/patch-artifact record — not the artifact itself.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: approved plan §2 event row (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5 'event/ 6종'); docs/specs/SAENA_k3s_Package_and_Operations_Spec_v1.md §4.2:190-211 PatchUnitCompleted message skeleton (patch_unit_id/worktree_commit/manifest_uri/changed_files/quality_gate_ids); field shapes copied verbatim from domain/patch-artifact/v1 where present there (patch_unit_id, worktree_commit [7-40 hex short-sha convention], manifest_uri, changed_files, quality_gate_ids). quality_gate_status is a payload-only summary field (not a domain/patch-artifact field) mirroring ADR-0013 appendix example 1's payload.quality_gate_status usage. NO additionalProperties:false (open class — forward-compatible gate-specific/service-specific extension fields permitted at payload root, consistent with VerificationResult's open-class precedent). ADR-0024(e)-1 BAN: this payload MUST NOT carry tenant_id or run_id properties — the envelope (packages/contracts/json-schema/envelope/event-envelope/v1) already carries both in its tenant context_type branch. Re-projecting either key into payload is a review-reject condition (ADR-0014 §Constraints duplicate-identifier ban, extended to run_id by ADR-0024(e)-1).

patch_unit_id.$comment: k3s §4.2:193 PatchUnitCompleted.patch_unit_id; mirrors domain/patch-artifact/v1#/properties/patch_unit_id shape (free string, minLength 1).

worktree_commit.$comment: k3s §4.2:194 PatchUnitCompleted.worktree_commit; mirrors domain/patch-artifact/v1#/properties/worktree_commit shape (7-40 hex short-sha convention, ADR-0023 worktree execution conventions).

manifest_uri.$comment: k3s §4.2:196 PatchUnitCompleted.manifest_uri; mirrors domain/patch-artifact/v1#/properties/manifest_uri (uri_ref — query/fragment forbidden, ADR-0024(f)).

changed_files.$comment: k3s §4.2:197 PatchUnitCompleted.changed_files; mirrors domain/patch-artifact/v1#/properties/changed_files (paths only, never content).

quality_gate_status.$comment: ADR-0013 appendix example 1 (payload.quality_gate_status) — payload-level roll-up summary, distinct from the per-gate quality.gate.passed|failed.v1 event family and from domain/verification-result.status.
